creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthieu Volat from comment #16)

I finally have a working cura on 14.1 on my laptop. Thank you  Matthieu Volat for that.
I've updated the cura git diffs and tar ball on www.FreeBSD.org/~db 

I'd like to see this all the tree pronto as well as I need to do some 3D printing. ;) This monster port needs to be split up into smaller PRs. I could do that all but help would be nice. ;)
